hero.title: Physical proof of the land, verifiable by any auditor
hero.subtitle: We certify agro-climatic data for coffee, cocoa and avocado with in-ground sensors and satellite evidence, anchored on-chain for EUDR compliance.

how.title: Two independent proofs, one certificate
how.step_chemical_desc: In-ground sensors continuously measure pH, conductivity, humidity and temperature at two depths.
how.step_satellite_desc: A satellite image of the parcel is retained and anchored by its hash, reproducible before an auditor.
how.step_certificate_desc: At dispatch, a certificate is issued per parcel and cycle, with its GeoJSON for TRACES NT.

value.title: Frictionless verification is the product
value.point_traceable: Every certificate is checked in seconds, without asking anyone for anything.
value.point_hybrid: Hybrid proof: what the soil measures and what the satellite sees, together.
value.point_eudr: A deliverable ready for EU customs: GeoJSON for TRACES NT.

login.demo_hint: Mock mode: no backend yet. Enter with a demo profile.
